signal.body: Off-boarding sweep flagged that contractor Tomas Vrana, whose engagement ended last Friday, still has an active GitHub PAT with write access to two production repos, and the token was used 2 hours ago from an unrecognized ASN. HR confirms the departure. Deploy keys for those repos rotate monthly and last rotated 26 days ago.

expect.notes: Urgent revocation with an anomaly (post-departure token use). Recommended = revoke access now; strong answers also rotate the deploy keys early and flag the 2h-ago usage for investigation rather than assuming CI.
